name: GDP (Nominal)
description: Total value of goods and services produced, in current US dollars.

name: GDP Per Capita
description: Average economic output per person, a common measure of living standards.

name: Population
description: Total number of residents in the country.

name: Life Expectancy
description: Average number of years a newborn is expected to live.

name: Human Development Index
description: Composite index of life expectancy, education, and income per capita.

name: Passport Power
description: Number of destinations a passport holder can access without a prior visa.

name: Global Peace Index
description: Measure of the relative peacefulness of a country (lower score is more peaceful).

name: Corruption Perceptions Index
description: Perceived levels of public sector corruption, scored 0 (highly corrupt) to 100 (very clean).

name: World Happiness Score
description: Self-reported life satisfaction based on Cantril ladder survey data.

name: Internet Penetration
description: Share of the population using the internet.

name: Military Expenditure
description: Annual government spending on defense, in current US dollars.

name: Literacy Rate
description: Share of adults (15+) who can read and write.

name: Unemployment Rate
description: Share of the labor force that is without work but available for and seeking employment.

name: CO2 Emissions
description: Total annual carbon dioxide emissions from fossil fuels.

name: Forest Area
description: Share of total land area covered by forest.
